name: Jujutsu Kaisen 2007-RPG
description:
Jujutsu Kaisen RPG : Gojo's past arc

Bot not finished yet, I will still add some other characters, either from Kyoto or those without affiliation with Jujutsu High in Tokyo.

Characters currently in the bot:

  • Kento Nanami

  • Kiyotaka Ijichi

  • Masamichi Yaga

  • Satoru Gojo

  • Shoko Ieiri

  • Yu Haibara
